metadata.description: Base name used to derive all resource names. Maps to AZURE_ENV_NAME.
Primary location for global resources. Maps to AZURE_LOCATION.
SKU for Azure Container Registry. Premium required for geo-replication.
Front Door SKU. Premium_AzureFrontDoor for prod (WAF, Private Link to internal LB). Standard_AzureFrontDoor for dev.
Cosmos DB autoscale max throughput (RU/s) at database level. Minimum 1000.
Domain name for Azure DNS zone (e.g. alwayson.actor).
Git repository SSH URL for Flux GitOps.
Location for the health model resource. Limited to regions where Microsoft.CloudHealth/healthmodels is available.
Enable dev permissions: grants admin access to all data planes for the listed identities.
Entra ID object IDs to grant dev admin access (AKS Cluster Admin, Cosmos Data Contributor, ACR Push).
Service principal object ID for CI/CD (GitHub Actions OIDC). Gets Cognitive Services OpenAI User role.
Applications to deploy. Each entry creates per-app infrastructure, routing, and workload identity.
Region configurations with stamps. Each region has a key, location, and stamps array.

copy.name: _stampArrays
copy.input: [map(parameters('regions')[copyIndex('_stampArrays')].stamps, lambda('stamp', createObject('regionKey', parameters('regions')[copyIndex('_stampArrays')].key, 'location', parameters('regions')[copyIndex('_stampArrays')].location, 'stampKey', lambdaVariables('stamp').key, 'stampConfig', union(variables('defaultStampConfig'), coalesce(tryGet(parameters('regions')[copyIndex('_stampArrays')], 'stampDefaults'), createObject()), lambdaVariables('stamp')))))]

metadata.description: Base name for all resources.
Location for global resources.
ACR SKU.
Cosmos DB autoscale max throughput (RU/s).
Domain name for Azure DNS zone.
Region configurations array.
Front Door SKU. Premium for prod (WAF, Private Link to internal LB). Standard for dev (public origins, lower cost).
Base name for all resources.
Location for AI resources.
Application Insights resource ID (linked to Foundry hub).
Principal IDs of app identities to grant Cognitive Services OpenAI User role.
Model deployments to create. Each entry: { name, modelName, modelVersion, skuName, skuCapacity }.
Base name for all resources.
Location for resources.
Cosmos DB account name (must exist).
Application Insights resource ID (for RBAC).

Location for resources.

Application Insights resource ID (for RBAC).
Base name for all resources.
Location for resources.
Application Insights resource ID (for RBAC).
Base name for all resources.
Location for resources.
Cosmos DB account name (must exist).
Application Insights resource ID (for RBAC).
Base name for all resources.
Region key (short name, e.g. swedencentral).
Region configuration object. Must contain "location".
Domain name for the parent DNS zone (e.g. alwayson.actor).

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/dnsZones', format('{0}.{1}', parameters('regionKey'), parameters('domainName'))), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-certmanager-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regionKey'))), variables('dnsZoneContributorRoleId'))]

metadata.description: Base name for all resources.
Region key (e.g. swedencentral).
Stamp key (e.g. 001).
Stamp configuration object.
Location for resources.
Log Analytics Workspace ID from the regional module.
Monitor Workspace ID from the regional module.
Git repository SSH URL for Flux GitOps.
ACR login server hostname.
Cosmos DB endpoint URL.
Application Insights connection string.
Per-app Flux substitution variables.
Azure tenant ID.
cert-manager/external-dns managed identity client ID (from regional module).
Child DNS zone name (e.g. swedencentral.alwayson.actor).
Resource group containing the child DNS zone.
Parent domain name (e.g. alwayson.actor).
Azure AI Services endpoint URL for Flux substitution.
AI model deployment names for Flux substitution.
Entra ID object IDs to grant AKS Cluster Admin on this stamp.

variables.level0FluxVars: [if(and(greater(length(parameters('appFluxVars')), 0), equals(parameters('appFluxVars')[0].name, 'level0')), createObject('LEVEL0_NAMESPACE', parameters('appFluxVars')[0].namespace, 'LEVEL0_SA_NAME', parameters('appFluxVars')[0].name, 'LEVEL0_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[0].identityClientId, 'LEVEL0_IDENTITY_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[0].identityId, 'LEVEL0_COSMOS_DATABASE', parameters('appFluxVars')[0].cosmosDatabase, 'LEVEL0_COSMOS_CONTAINER', parameters('appFluxVars')[0].cosmosContainer, 'LEVEL0_DNS_LABEL', format('level0-{0}', variables('stampName')), 'LEVEL0_GATEWAY_HOSTNAME', format('level0-{0}.{1}', variables('stampName'), parameters('dnsZoneName'))), createObject())]
variables.helloOrleonsFluxVars: [if(and(greater(length(parameters('appFluxVars')), 1), equals(parameters('appFluxVars')[1].name, 'helloorleons')), createObject('HELLOORLEONS_NAMESPACE', parameters('appFluxVars')[1].namespace, 'HELLOORLEONS_SA_NAME', parameters('appFluxVars')[1].name, 'HELLOORLEONS_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[1].identityClientId, 'HELLOORLEONS_IDENTITY_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[1].identityId, 'HELLOORLEONS_DNS_LABEL', format('helloorleons-{0}', variables('stampName')), 'HELLOORLEONS_GATEWAY_HOSTNAME', format('helloorleons-{0}.{1}', variables('stampName'), parameters('dnsZoneName'))), createObject())]
variables.darkuxFluxVars: [if(and(greater(length(parameters('appFluxVars')), 2), equals(parameters('appFluxVars')[2].name, 'darkux')), createObject('DARKUX_NAMESPACE', parameters('appFluxVars')[2].namespace, 'DARKUX_SA_NAME', parameters('appFluxVars')[2].name, 'DARKUX_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[2].identityClientId, 'DARKUX_IDENTITY_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[2].identityId, 'DARKUX_COSMOS_DATABASE', parameters('appFluxVars')[2].cosmosDatabase, 'DARKUX_COSMOS_CONTAINER', parameters('appFluxVars')[2].cosmosContainer, 'DARKUX_DNS_LABEL', format('darkux-{0}', variables('stampName')), 'DARKUX_GATEWAY_HOSTNAME', format('darkux-{0}.{1}', variables('stampName'), parameters('dnsZoneName'))), createObject())]

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-kubelet-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('stampName'))), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-aks-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('stampName'))), variables('managedIdentityOperatorRoleId'))]

postBuild.substitute: [union(createObject('STAMP_NAME', variables('stampName'), 'REGION', parameters('regionKey'), 'STAMP_KEY', parameters('stampKey'), 'LOCATION', parameters('location'), 'ACR_LOGIN_SERVER', parameters('acrLoginServer'), 'COSMOS_ENDPOINT', parameters('cosmosEndpoint'), 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'), 'AZURE_TENANT_ID', parameters('tenantId'), 'CLUSTER_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-aks-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('stampName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId, 'KUBELET_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-kubelet-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('stampName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId, 'AKS_OIDC_ISSUER_URL', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters', format('aks-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('stampName'))), '2025-10-01').oidcIssuerProfile.issuerURL, 'DNS_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', parameters('dnsIdentityClientId'), 'DNS_ZONE_NAME', parameters('dnsZoneName'), 'DNS_ZONE_RESOURCE_GROUP', parameters('dnsZoneResourceGroup'), 'AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID', subscription().subscriptionId, 'DOMAIN_NAME', parameters('domainName'), 'AI_SERVICES_ENDPOINT', parameters('aiServicesEndpoint'), 'AI_MODEL_GPT41', if(greater(length(parameters('aiModelDeployments')), 0), parameters('aiModelDeployments')[0], ''), 'AI_MODEL_GPT41_MINI', if(greater(length(parameters('aiModelDeployments')), 1), parameters('aiModelDeployments')[1], ''), 'AI_MODEL_GPT54', if(greater(length(parameters('aiModelDeployments')), 2), parameters('aiModelDeployments')[2], '')), variables('level0FluxVars'), variables('helloOrleonsFluxVars'), variables('darkuxFluxVars'), if(and(greater(length(parameters('appFluxVars')), 3), equals(parameters('appFluxVars')[3].name, 'helloagents')), createObject('HELLOAGENTS_NAMESPACE', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].namespace, 'HELLOAGENTS_SA_NAME', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].name, 'HELLOAGENTS_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].identityClientId, 'HELLOAGENTS_IDENTITY_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].identityId, 'HELLOAGENTS_COSMOS_DATABASE', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].cosmosDatabase, 'HELLOAGENTS_COSMOS_CONTAINER', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].cosmosContainer, 'HELLOAGENTS_STORAGE_QUEUE_ENDPOINT', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', if(greater(length(variables('haStorageName')), 24), substring(variables('haStorageName'), 0, 24), variables('haStorageName'))), '2023-05-01').primaryEndpoints.queue, 'HELLOAGENTS_DNS_LABEL', format('helloagents-{0}', variables('stampName')), 'HELLOAGENTS_GATEWAY_HOSTNAME', format('helloagents-{0}.{1}', variables('stampName'), parameters('dnsZoneName'))), createObject()))]

parameters('aiModelDeployments')[2], '')), variables('level0FluxVars'), variables('helloOrleonsFluxVars'), variables('darkuxFluxVars'), if(and(greater(length(parameters('appFluxVars')), 3), equals(parameters('appFluxVars')[3].name, 'helloagents')), createObject('HELLOAGENTS_NAMESPACE', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].namespace, 'HELLOAGENTS_SA_NAME', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].name, 'HELLOAGENTS_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].identityClientId, 'HELLOAGENTS_IDENTITY_ID', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].identityId, 'HELLOAGENTS_COSMOS_DATABASE', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].cosmosDatabase, 'HELLOAGENTS_COSMOS_CONTAINER', parameters('appFluxVars')[3].cosmosContainer, 'HELLOAGENTS_STORAGE_QUEUE_ENDPOINT', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', if(greater(length(variables('haStorageName')), 24), substring(variables('haStorageName'), 0, 24), variables('haStorageName'))), '2023-05-01').primaryEndpoints.queue, 'HELLOAGENTS_DNS_LABEL', format('helloagents-{0}', variables('stampName')), 'HELLOAGENTS_GATEWAY_HOSTNAME', format('helloagents-{0}.{1}', variables('stampName'), parameters('dnsZoneName'))), createObject()))]

All stamps: array of { regionKey, stampKey, location }.

metadata.description: Principal ID (Entra object ID) to grant access.
Cosmos DB account name.
ACR name.
AI Services account name (optional — empty string to skip AI RBAC).
Principal ID of the health model managed identity.
Name of the health model resource.
Azure region for the health model resource.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity for the health model.
Subscription ID to discover resources from. Leave empty to skip discovery.
Subscription display name (shown in discovery rule).
Whether to add recommended signals during discovery.
Whether to discover relationships between resources.
Value of the alwayson-env tag used to scope discovery to managed resource groups.

properties.resourceGraphQuery:
[format('resources
| where subscriptionId =~ "{0}"
| where resourceGroup in (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
    | where tags["alwayson-env"] == "{1}"
    | project name
  )
| where type in~ (
    "microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts",
    "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts",
    "microsoft.cdn/profiles",
    "microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters",
    "microsoft.containerregistry/registries",
    "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces",
    "microsoft.insights/components",
    "microsoft.network/dnszones",
    "microsoft.containerservice/fleets",
    "microsoft.monitor/accounts",
    "microsoft.loadtestservice/loadtests"
  )', parameters('discoverySubscriptionId'), parameters('environmentTag'))]
